posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
When in a table view you can hover over the name of the item → click “Open” → Select Item Card on the right side panel and see an item card view.

This view is currently not customizable, besides being able to hide certain columns from displaying. Certain text fields get cut off on this view and it would be helpful to customize the size of long text fields or have long text fields automatically default to a larger size.
